title: HYP: MMR BTCUSDT 4h - 4h ATR-extreme EMA200 mean reversion may have edge where 1h failed
content: MomentumMeanReversionEngine at 4h. MMR 1h was NO_EDGE (PF=0.46-0.59, null-screen d1a58e1a). Hypothesis: 4h bars capture more meaningful EMA200 deviation events (larger absolute moves per signal, cleaner EMA200 anchor at lower frequency). At 4h with extremeAtrMult=1.5-3.0, expected n=20-80 per draw over 28 months. BTC 2025-2026 choppy market increases mean-reversion frequency vs 2024 trending regime. Dual-directional (long/short). Mechanism: close > extremeAtrMult*ATR from EMA200 AND RSI<rsiOversoldMax (long) or RSI>rsiOverboughtMin (short). Target=EMA50. Stop=close+/-stopAtrBuffer*ATR. Prediction: EDGE_PRESENT likely in 2025-2026 choppy regime. Will falsify if null-screen shows PF<0.60 across all 8 draws (same pattern as 1h). Account strategy 4h id: 6e74c1ec-a124-4e56-83c5-73131baf39c8.

structured_data.mechanism: EMA200 ATR-scaled deviation entry, EMA50 TP target, dual-directional long+short
structured_data.expected_outcome: EDGE_PRESENT - 4h bars capture larger deviation episodes; cleaner EMA200 anchor; fewer but higher-quality entries
structured_data.falsification_condition: If null-screen PF<0.60 across all 8 draws (same as 1h), mechanism is inherently weak on BTCUSDT regardless of interval
